Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can only hope that this recording[n]reaches someone with a conscience...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Isn't this... that video...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My employer has become[n]obsessed with a loathsome idea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This experiment should never[n]have been conceived...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That's why I had to do[n]something to put a stop to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}However, in doing so, I released a number of Shadows[n]that are certain to torment future generations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But... I didn't have a choice... If I didn't do this...[n]it could have destroyed the entire world![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please, you need to listen very carefully...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whatever you do, it is imperative that you[n]do not hunt the Shadows that have dispersed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Huh? This part's...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wasn't able to do anything to stop this madness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He won't listen to a word I say... He's been[n]seduced by the devil's temptations...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Those monsters will try to reunite and become one[n]again... If they succeed, then we're all doomed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll say it once more... Do not go after[n]the Shadows that were released![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This is... the original video. The real one...[n]before Ikutsuki went and tampered with it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dad was trying to put a stop to the experiment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's not much hope for me now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have just one request...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whoever finds this... please...[n]give my daughter Yukari this message...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I know I promised I'd be home soon...[n]and I'm sorry to break that promise...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I want you to know... as your father, I was[n]never happier in my life than when I was with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This really is... my dad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I love you, Yukari. Please...[n]Take care of yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
